name: Recovery Android
description:
Being an Outdated Robot sucked, And even worse was being hunted down by Giant Companys trying to 'refurbish you' and worst of all now you got a Advanced Recovery android after you.

Edit: Update 11/9/2025, Finally got around to Sprucing Up corva's personality and adding a new Starting message, as well i touched up the Senario, Should be more consistant while leaving room for Interesting Senarios to Happen.

Edit: Update 11/13/2025, Couln't help myself, had an idea for another intro where You cut straight to being caught and Corva hauls you off to the refurbishment process, been working on my Alt AI corruption Scenario and Its comming along well, Nearly finished for the most part. Just HAD to come back and add some more Starts to Corva.

Edit: Update 2/2/2026, got bored and was disappointed with the lack of fun robot user bots, so I decided to add another few intros for this bot.

Edit: Update 3/1/2026, added another intro, if anyone has any idea for new intro's for this bot give me an idea.
creator: Bolted-Blue
